name: The Thai Setakij Insurance Public Company Limited
summary: The Thai Setakij Insurance Public Company Limited engages in the non-life insurance business in Thailand. It offers fire, property risk, marine and transportation, motor cargo, and engineering insurance, as well as miscellaneous insurance products. The company also provides car, accident, travel, and home and condo insurance products. It serves to individual and corporate customers. The company was founded in 1942 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
